tests.description: registerPlugin stores a plugin and getPluginManifest returns its public surface
tests.action: MU.registerPlugin({name: 'Reg Test', extension: 'rt', export: async (c) => c, import: async (c) => c}, 'Reg Test'); const entry = MU.getPluginManifest().find(m => m.name === 'Reg Test'); expect(entry).toBeDefined(); expect(entry.name).toBe('Reg Test'); expect(entry.extension).toBe('rt'); expect(entry.export).toBeUndefined(); expect(entry.import).toBeUndefined()

tests.description: getPluginManifest returns only { name, extension } — no function references
